abilities: Pick it up, pick it up!
Oh, oh, oh. Time to accelerate!
I feel this in my bones!
I think we could use some good vibes.
Let's get into a healing rhythm.
Let's get some healing beats going!
Let the healing sound wash over you!
This beat will heal you up.
Ha ha, you want that louder?!
Turn it up, turn it up!
Oh, let's break it down! (self and friendly)
chatter: We're here to be heard!
Another day, another mission. Man! I'm so excited.
Everyone ready?
I think this mission might inspire my next single: "Lúcio Saves the Day."
Let's get this show on the road!
Pump up the bass! It's time to roll out.
Settin' my equalizer to absolute destruction.
Overwatch? Oh, man. You guys are my heroes! (with only Overwatch members or former Overwatch members on the team)
All right. Here we go!
I am so ready for this!
Let's get a groove on.
Let's put them on the spot.
Roll out!
Look at that! We're on track for a win!
See, what did I tell you? Such a great team.
That went great, let's do it again!
Oh, what's that sound? The sound of nearing victory!
Hey, we lost, but now it's time to win. Right?
Let's be honest: that could have gone better. But we can still turn it around!
Okay. Not our best fight. But we can still do this.
All that matters is what we do here, so let's win this!
Final round! You ready for this? I'm ready for this.
This is it, everyone! Final round.
We've got this in the bag for sure. Let's do this!
Back in the mix!
Let's take it from the top.
Uh, maybe I'll try something different this time.
Uh... next track!
Uh, that was just a sound check.
Switching tracks.
This music stops for no one.
Time for a remix!
You know, it's not always gonna be a top hit.
That's the last time I invite her to a charity concert. (eliminated by D.Va )
These music rivalries get heated, man... (eliminated by another Lúcio )
Honestly, getting knocked out by Reinhardt Wilhelm? Kind of an honor. (eliminated by Reinhardt )
I was knocking them off left and right. Let's do it some more! (getting environmental kills in previous fight)
Yeah, I took a beat... but they took a beating! (team kill)
Am I supposed to wait for my team, or...?
Backup's still comin'.
Let's get the band back together.
Where's the rest of the band?
Good as new!
I feel great!
Now, that's more like it.
Ha ha, I'm burnin' up!
I'm turning up the heat!
Is it hot in here, or is it just me ?!
Ow! These beats are fire!
Woo! Check this out, I am on fire!
Woo! I am on fire!
Aw, yeah!
Ha ha! Yes!
Look at that!
Oh, just wait till we hit the drop!
You always mix before you master.
My lucky day!
That's what I'm talking about!
This one's definitely going platinum.
I'm feeling good!
Whew, thanks.
Woo, get hype!
Wo-ho, now that's more like it!
Thanks!
Nothing's going to stop me!
We're on the same wavelength.
That's not right!
I'm too young to die!
Guess they aren't done yet.
Aw man, they're getting up again!
Ally Ultimate Remark
Thank you, thank you.
Unreal!
I am runnin' this show!
I make this look easy!
call-outs: This is an uphill fight. Careful!
Someone's hiding here. I know it!
Time for the collab of the century!
Just a little more, hang in there!
Just hang tight, we can do this!
No way we're going to lose this! Hang on!
We're so close, just hang in there!
We've got this in the bag, just stay focused!
Get on the attack or it's game over!
Go, go, go! We're runnin' out of time!
Not much time left, let's get a move on!
We gotta pick up the pace, time's running out!
We have to pick it up! Let's attack!
eliminations: Guess you weren't feelin' it, huh?
Oh, that sounded like it hurt.
Oh, you don't like this song?
That drop too hard for you?
Woah! You're going a little too hard.
Oh, was that beat too sick ? (eliminating Baptiste or Mercy )
I hope this doesn't mess with your stream schedule! (eliminating D.Va )
Get that corporate nonsense out of here! (eliminating Domina )
Eh, I'm used to the sun. (eliminating Illari )
Another one bites the dust. (eliminating Junker Queen )
*laugh* The power of tech in the right hands. (eliminating Lifeweaver or Symmetra , Domina bugged/not included)
How's that for a diss tape? (eliminating another Lúcio )
Nuh-uh. I am not a fan of those beams. (eliminating Moira , Symmetra or Zarya )
Does this make you a deadbeat? (eliminating Reaper )
We did it better. (eliminating Symmetra , Domina bugged/not included)
No one's cheerin' for you now! (eliminating Vendetta )
I almost forgot I fired those. (long-range elimination)
How's that for the speed of sound? (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Oh, you wanted an encore? (eliminating resurrected enemy)
Found by sound! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Chill tunes to calm you down! (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Oh, I love helping others succeed!
Making use of that speed, I see.
Sped you up, you did the rest!
We're bringing out your best self!
I'll play it again and again!
Nano-Boosted Lúcio! My gun does damage, and it glows! (while Nano-Boosted by Ana )
Thanks, fox girl! (while boosted by Kiriko 's Kitsune Rush)
Thanks, Kiriko! You really make me shine. (while boosted by Kiriko 's Kitsune Rush)
Oh, what a moment to live for!
Team kill? Woo, look at us go!
This didn't have to get personal.
Now you really owe me one!
That's a lot of guy to punch... (eliminating Mauga )
No lava, Mr. Lindholm! No! (eliminating Torbjörn using Molten Core)
Oh, and what a play by Lúcio!
That's what I was born to do, baby!
Ha ha ha, there goes the drop!
Buh-bye, big guy. (eliminating Reinhardt , Roadhog , Sigma , Winston or Wrecking Ball )
Can your tech do that? (eliminating Symmetra , Domina bugged/not included)
Oh, did I ruin your big moment? (eliminating enemy during ultimate)
Oh, no, no, no. That's not how it goes! (eliminating Lúcio using Sound Barrier)
Hope you didn't work too hard on that.
You remember that turret? Me neither.
Oh, I got front row tickets for that!
Okay, okay. You've got some moves!
You gonna show me how to do that?
Oh, you've been holding out on me!
You're the star of the show! (to Illari )
Me-ow, you got claws! (to Jetpack Cat )
interactions: Lúcio : Hey. Uh... did I do something to upset you? I feel like you've been avoiding me. Anran : Oh, no, no! I'm so sorry. I just really wanted an autograph, and I didn't want to be weird. Lúcio : You should have just said so! What am I signing? Anran : Everything.

Ashe: Do my eyes deceive me, or are you wearing skates? Nice skates. Very cute. You going to swap those out before we get to the gunfight? Y'all, our teammate is wearing skates. To a gunfight! Hahaha! Lúcio: You'll see what these can do!
Lúcio: Can I get a beat? Bastion: *beep boxing* Lúcio: Haha, perfect! You're the best.
Lúcio: All right. Let's hear that fighting spirit! Bastion: *spirited beeps* D.Va: Grrr! Pharah: Rawrrr! Tracer: Grarrr! Lúcio: That's exactly what I'm talking about! Woo!
Brigitte: Lúcio, have you ever written lyrics before? Lúcio: I've dabbled a bit. What's up? Brigitte: I was wondering if you would look at... Actually, I'm going to work on it a bit more.

Lúcio : Still can't believe I get to work with a real cowboy. What's it like in the American West? Cassidy : Lizards and dirt, far as the eye can see. Lúcio : Wow! That sounds amazing. Cassidy : Beats the city, I'll tell you that.
D.Va: Look at this team! We're gonna do great. Lúcio: Hey! That's my line! D.Va: *chuckle* It sounds better when I say it.
Lúcio : Doesn't matter how many "accidents" you cover up. Rio won't stop fighting to keep Vishkar out of our home! Domina : This is your attempt at resistance? Huh, I hardly noticed.
Domina : Do keep that little noisemaker away from me. I shan't be seen with such an inferior design. Lúcio : Uh, I think you mean, "original design"? Maybe you suits forgot who you stole it from?

Domina : Aren't you going to ask about my favorite little creature? Lúcio : Alright, fine. What's your favorite animal? Domina : Oh, well, I find chinchillas absolutely adorable! And they make the softest coats... Lúcio : *sigh* Yeah. I can see it...

Doomfist: The Circuit Royal. A contest of will and technical ingenuity. A dance of beauty... and of destruction. Lúcio: Is everything poetry and philosophy with you? Doomfist: Everything is. When you pay attention.
Echo : I have been studying the composition of your songs. Lúcio : Studying? Nah! You've gotta feel and enjoy the music. Echo : I enjoy the mathematics.
Lúcio: Whoa, nice 'do! I respect a man who puts his hair up. Hanzo: It's more practical. And... quite dignified.

Illari: Lúcio, have you heard? About the winner of the football championship? Lúcio: I- uh... I-I don't wanna talk about it. Look, I believe in my team. We-we'll get 'em next time. It's only because the ref didn't see that foul from the first half! Oh, it was a fluke! That yellow card was ridiculous! *frustrated sound* If they just would have hit that last penalty shot... Yeah, it could've been worse. At least it wasn't like that Germany game.

Junkrat: We should do a concert together. Lúcio: Oh, what do you play? Junkrat: I-I sing! *high operatic singing* I sing. La la la la la la... *singing scales* I sing. Laaaa... *continues singing* I sing. Figaro, figaro-figaro-figaro-figaro, figaro... ooh-ooooh! Lúcio: Wow. Yeah, uh... I'll have to get back to you on that!

Juno : Lúcio, can you teach me about karaoke? Lúcio : I'd love to help but... As much as I love making music, I'm not much of a singer. Juno : Okay, then... How about partying? Lúcio : Now, that we can do!
Kiriko: Listened to your album the other day. Lúcio: Oh, uh, did you like it? Kiriko: Not sure there was enough bass. I could almost hear the other sounds. Lúcio: Ha! I'll crank it up next time!
Kiriko: You check out the new Antler Antler album? Lúcio: You've heard of them? Kiriko: Yeah. So... what'd you think? Lúcio: Nobody uses fifteen electric guitars like those guys!
Kiriko : So, DJ... what's your favorite animal? Lúcio : Oh! Uh, well... I really like tree frogs! Heh, I didn't expect anyone to ask. Kiriko : Tree frogs? Yeah, I can see it! *chuckle*

Lifeweaver: I love the warmth in your music. Your newest album is like listening to a sunrise. Lúcio: Wow, thanks. You should tell that to my critics. Lifeweaver: Critics? You? No! I won't stand for it.
Lúcio : You got a hobby? Y'know, besides going around the world making miserable. Mauga : I was gonna say listening to your tunes... Lúcio : Seriously? Mauga : But that'd be lying.
Lúcio: Mercy, are you ready to dance and groove? Mercy: I never stop!
Mercy: You've come a long way to joining Overwatch. I'm thankful to have your support. Lúcio: Aw, back at'cha! It's all about relying on each other.
Lúcio: You're really tellin' me your favorite animal isn't a turtle? Mizuki: What, because of the hat? Do you wear a frog on your head? Lúcio: Yeah, sometimes! Mizuki: You gotta be kidding me.
Lúcio : Hey, Orisa! Did Hassana and Naade get those VIP passes I sent them? Orisa : Somewhere amid their screaming, I believe they mentioned it. Lúcio : Ha! Hope I get to see them backstage!

Lúcio : Oh, looking sharp, Orisa! Efi get you some new tech? Orisa : Yes. Defending Numbani has earned us the resources to greatly improve my systems. Lúcio : Oh, too cool! Give her some props for me.
Lúcio : You seem... different, Orisa. Orisa : That may be. I have grown much since our first encounter. Lúcio : Hey, we're all growing. Just don't forget who you are, okay? Orisa : Never, Lúcio!

Lúcio : Can you believe it?! Lúcio and Orisa... saving the world with Overwatch ! Orisa : It hardly feels real. I am honored to fight at your side, Lúcio! Lúcio : And, hey. I want to feature you on my new single! Orisa : Ah... of course. Please excuse me. *hushed, excited cry*
Lúcio : I haven't forgotten about what you did to Rio. Ramattra : I'm glad your memory is intact. Let's get on with this.
Lúcio : I think I've added too much bass to my new track. Roadhog : *chuckles* No such thing.
Lúcio : Hey, big man. You got any requests? Roadhog : A little silence would be nice.
Sigma : That music... could the volume be increased? Lúcio : Really? You're a fan of my tunes? Sigma : Of course! They are delightfully... distracting...
Lúcio : Who's your favorite hockey team? Sojourn : I'm more of a basketball person. Lúcio : Not a fan of your home team? Sojourn : Don't put words in my mouth.
Sojourn : You and Juno have been doing a great job to make the new recruits feel welcome. Lúcio : What can I say? It's all about curating the vibes.

Lúcio : Did your bosses ever rebuild that favela? You know, the one that mysteriously burned down? Symmetra : I am told that it is on the backlog. Lúcio : Funny how that sort of project always gets... deprioritized.

Symmetra: I've been listening to your new music. Lúcio: Why? Is Vishkar doing research on me or something? Symmetra: Oh no. I'm intrigued by how the sound moves behind my eyes when I listen. Lúcio: Oh! That's because it's binaural. Uh, glad you like it.
Symmetra: I may have another opportunity to travel to Rio de Janeiro. Do you have any feedback for the board? Lúcio: Yeah, I do. Stay out of my city.
Lúcio : Brigitte tells me you can dance, but I won't believe it until I see it! Torbjörn : * chuckle * Are you sure you'll be able to handle it? Lúcio : *laughs* Try me!
Tracer : A friend of mine has a massive collection of vintage vinyl. Lúcio : That's sick! If they want, I can send them some stuff too. Tracer : Iggy would love that!

Tracer : Iggy tells me you kept in touch after your little record trade. Lúcio : Yeah! We've been vibing our about your favorite tunes. She's got great tastes! Tracer : *giggles* Great taste in DJ's, too! Lúcio : You think so? *clears throat* That's... t-that'd be somethin' else.
Venture : All those concerts must be rough on your ears! Lúcio : Can't be much worse than listenin' to a drill all day! Venture : Huh? Can you speak up?! Lúcio : What?! I can't hear you!
Widowmaker : You're making too much noise. Lúcio : It's not noise. It's music! Widowmaker : Very well. You're making too much music.

Lúcio : Got any meditation tips? I have trouble calming down. Zenyatta : Try listening to silence. Lúcio : But it's like a blank canvas that just needs to be filled! Zenyatta : Then paint it with emptiness.

Lúcio: So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? One of 47: Ana: The caracal. Anran: Oh, the orchid mantis! Especially the pink ones! Ashe: I'm partial to scorpions. Baptiste: Hmm... tiger shark! Best kind of shark. Bastion: *elephant beeping* Brigitte: Ooh! Siberian tiger. Cassidy: *groan* I can never remember the name. It's... half black, half white, with a dangly nose? It's that... you know, pig thing. Like, the fancy jungle pig. What's that jungle animal with the... funky snout? D.Va: Definitely the Zergling. Doomfist: Whichever is strongest. I'm also fond of starlings... Echo: My current favorite is triceratops. My current favorite is a really big dog used to ward off bears. My current favorite is the rhinoceros. My current favorite is the tiger shark. My current favorite is the dragonfly. My current favorite is the penguin. My current favorite is the Jack Russell Terrier. Emre: Freja: Hmm... I quite like Stoats. Genji: Yeah... triceratops. Hanzo: The brave and beautiful koi. Hazard : Unicorn! Love me a sharp horse. Illari: Chuño. My llama. Jetpack Cat: *meows* Junker Queen: Is there a kind of dingo, that is... also a shark? Junkrat : I've always wanted a guinea pig. I'd name it... "Melrose"! Juno : *gasps* I would like to encounter a real horse. Kiriko: Really? Take a guess. Lifeweaver: The magnificent elkhorn coral. Mauga: Hammerhead. That's the best shark, no question. Mei: Ooh! I like penguins! Mercy: Eichhörnchen. That's German for "squirrel". Mizuki: I think black cats are the best cats. Moira: Scolopendra gigantea. (Scientific name for the Amazonian Giant Centipede) Orisa: Efi's favorite animal is the puppy. That is my favorite as well. Pharah: I like... those really big dogs! The ones they use to ward off bears! Ramattra: Ants. They build marvelous structures and cooperate when threatened. I find them... Inspirational. Reaper: Any animal will do... if you're hungry enough. Reinhardt: I identify with the noble rhinoceros. Roadhog: Pachimari . Sigma: The tardigrade, of course! The most adorable phylum in the irradiated vacuum of space. Soldier: 76: Jack Russell Terrier. Sojourn: I don't see why it's relevant, but... leopard seal. Sombra: I love those deep sea animals. Like the bigfin squid?! Symmetra: Dragonflies. Such perfect creatures. Torbjörn: Moose, of course. Tracer: Cheetah. No, uh, lion! Oh, wait, uh... Gorilla? Oh, no, sorry, Winston... Umm... Oh! I think it's a falcon, it's got to be. Vendetta : La Lupa. For her strength and her glory. Venture: * gasp * I've always wanted to get eaten alive by scarabs! Widowmaker: The black widow. Winston: Hmm... humans, I suppose! Wuyang: You ever see a stick bug? I think they're pretty neat. Zarya: Rabbits. The huge ones. Zenyatta: I envy ants for their clarity of purpose. Lúcio: Uh... yeah, I can see it.
map-specific: Who's ready to rock the Kasbah?
What's happening, Busan? I can't hear you!
I love these cars! Wonder if they'd let me drive one.
I played the sickest concert here. Colosseum hasn't been that packed since Spartacus!
Think we'll see A.I. Schylus ? I love everything he's in! Though he does always make me cry.
And the crowd goes wild! *imitates crowd cheering*
